channel.title: John Armitage — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by John Armitage (Egerton Capital) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: John Armitage: ADDED MSFT (+12%) · Q4 2025
item.description: John Armitage (Egerton Capital) added MSFT in Q4 2025 · 8.9% of portfolio. Quality compounder add.

item.title: John Armitage: ADDED META (+15%) · Q4 2025
item.description: John Armitage (Egerton Capital) added META in Q4 2025 · 7.2% of portfolio. Adding Meta.

item.title: John Armitage: NEW POSITION SCHW · Q4 2025
item.description: John Armitage (Egerton Capital) new position SCHW in Q4 2025 · 4.7% of portfolio. New Schwab position.

item.title: John Armitage: TRIMMED FTI (-6%) · Q4 2025
item.description: John Armitage (Egerton Capital) trimmed FTI (TECHNIPFMC PLC) in Q4 2025 · 1.0% of portfolio.

item.title: John Armitage: ADDED CGI (+10%) · Q4 2025
item.description: John Armitage (Egerton Capital) added CGI (CGI INC) in Q4 2025 · 0.3% of portfolio.

item.title: John Armitage: EXITED AAPL (-100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: John Armitage (Egerton Capital) exited AAPL (APPLE INC) in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.

item.title: John Armitage: ADDED MSFT (+8%) · Q3 2025
item.description: John Armitage (Egerton Capital) added MSFT in Q3 2025 · 8.0% of portfolio. Steady Microsoft build.

item.title: John Armitage: ADDED GOOGL (+12%) · Q3 2025
item.description: John Armitage (Egerton Capital) added GOOGL in Q3 2025 · 6.8% of portfolio. Adding Alphabet.
